e7312f21ff82.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
e7312f21ff82.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
e7312f21ff82.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

472988ad4619.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
472988ad4619.description: At 3.7/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
472988ad4619.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

719c98f7e861.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
719c98f7e861.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

a5b9810da746.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
a5b9810da746.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
a5b9810da746.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

971e858b1bad.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
971e858b1bad.description: At 35 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
